goal: spec_comap[R, S](f, p) = Spec.of_prime[R](prime_ideal_preimage[R, S](f, p.point))
proof: function[T0: CommRing, T1: CommRing](x0: RingHom[T0, T1], x1: Spec[T1]) { Spec.of_prime[T0](prime_ideal_preimage[T0, T1](x0, x1.point)) = spec_comap[T0, T1](x0, x1) }[R, S](f, p)
function[T0: CommRing](x0: lib(ideal).PrimeIdeal[T0]) { Spec.of_prime[T0](x0) = lib(spec).spec_of_prime[T0](x0) }[R](prime_ideal_preimage[R, S](f, p.point))
Spec.of_prime[R](prime_ideal_preimage[R, S](f, p.point)).point != prime_ideal_preimage[R, S](f, p.point)
Spec.of_prime[R](prime_ideal_preimage[R, S](f, p.point)).point = prime_ideal_preimage[R, S](f, p.point)
f.hom(x) ∈ p.point != x ∈ prime_ideal_preimage[R, S](f, p.point)

goal: set_preimage[Spec[S], Spec[R]](spec_comap[R, S](f), Spec.basic_open(a)).contains(p) = Spec.basic_open(a).contains(spec_comap[R, S](f, p))
Spec.basic_open(a).contains(spec_comap[R, S](f, p)) = not spec_comap[R, S](f, p).point.contains(a)

proof: p ∈ set_preimage[Spec[S], Spec[R]](spec_comap[R, S](f), Spec.basic_open(a)) or p ∈ Spec.basic_open(f.hom(a))
not p ∈ set_preimage[Spec[S], Spec[R]](spec_comap[R, S](f), Spec.basic_open(a)) or not p ∈ Spec.basic_open(f.hom(a))
not p ∈ set_preimage[Spec[S], Spec[R]](spec_comap[R, S](f), Spec.basic_open(a))

function[T0](x0: lib(set_base).Set[T0], x1: lib(set_base).Set[T0]) { x0.contains != x1.contains or x0 = x1 }[Spec[S]](Spec.basic_open(f.hom(a)), set_preimage[Spec[S], Spec[R]](spec_comap[R, S](f), Spec.basic_open(a)))
